title: Finite Chebyshev-System Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Chebyshev duplicate-node and interpolation QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Degenerate duplicate-node Vandermonde grid with determinant 0 versus the false determinant-1 unisolvence claim, plus an exact interpolation sample conflict where p(1)=4 but the malformed row claims p(1)=5.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote interpolation or alternation rows only when they add distinct exact-linear regression pressure; keep Haar, minimax, and infinite-dimensional theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite sample grids and polynomial bases as exact rational evaluation matrices.
Replay determinant, interpolation, and sign-pattern rows by deterministic exact arithmetic.
